memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int nrows, const vector< unsigned int > &parentVoxel, vector< vector< unsigned int > > &colIndex)
memberdef.name: buildColIndex

memberdef.argsstring: (vector< double > &areaProportion, const vector< unsigned int > &parentVoxel, const vector< double > &area)
memberdef.name: findAreaProportion

detaileddescription.para: Motor transport into branches is divided between the child branches in proportion to their area. This function computes these proportions.
